text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 1 

Variable Details 

This section of the codebook contains one entry for each variable in the MedPAR file. Each entry contains variable details 
to facilitate understanding and use of the variables. 

ACMDTNS_TOT_CHRG_AMT 

LABEL: Total Charge for All Accommodations ($) 

DESCRIPTION: The total charge amount (rounded to whole dollars) for all accommodations (routine hospital room 
and board charges
